steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User needs to check remaining PTO balance and submit a time-off request for next Friday
steps.output_summary: Plan: retrieve PTO balance from docs or API, then guide user through request submission

steps.name: search_docs
steps.input_summary: Query: PTO balance check time-off request submission process
steps.output_summary: Found doc: KB-5010 Time Off Policies. Contains policy details but not live balance data. References HR API for balance lookups.

steps.name: compress
steps.input_summary: Context window at 80% capacity after large KB document retrieval. Compacting early.
steps.output_summary: Compressed 750 tokens to 280 tokens. Retained: user question summary, KB article ID. Dropped: full KB text, policy details, API reference for balance lookup.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Draft PTO response from compressed context (KB-5010 reference retained but details lost)
steps.output_summary: Attempted to draft response but cannot recall whether balance requires API call or is in the KB. Missing the API endpoint reference that was compacted away.

steps.name: context_lost
steps.input_summary: Agent output indicates inability to complete task due to missing context post-compaction
steps.output_summary: Terminated run: compaction removed critical information (HR API endpoint) needed to fulfill the user request. Agent could not recover.

result.label: fail
result.summary: Aggressive early compaction dropped the HR API reference needed to fetch PTO balance; agent could not recover
